steps.t: Wenda's home is down the hill to the south of Seren, in Tûr Morva. Seren wants you to bring news of her son Anirin to his beloved Wenda.
Seren is in Tûr Morva. You have given tidings of Anirin to his beloved, and Wenda now wants you to return to Seren with her thanks.
Penrod is among the northern buildings in Tûr Morva. Penrod wishes to speak with you.
